tasks.name: Normalize v8 machine-readable instruction file
tasks.description: Ensure bash.md has one v8 title and strict machine-readable content with no legacy version labels.

assert: content parses as JSON after title line

tasks.name: Encode NOcron trigger-loop semantics
tasks.description: Define initial cron trigger of first task, then python self-scheduling loop that schedules exactly one next cron job and exits cleanly at completion.

assert: nocron_flow.trigger_model exists and states first-task-only cron trigger

tasks.name: Define mandatory React+Express layer
tasks.description: Mark React+Express as mandatory and tie rationale to Tauri/Rust CPU constraints.

tasks.name: Add prompt compression slider contract
tasks.description: Add user-controlled slider in prompt compression step with range 0 to 50.

tasks.name: Add user-defined export path contract
tasks.description: Require user-provided output folder path and enforce writable-path checks.

tasks.name: Encode gap-capture policy for diagram incompleteness
tasks.description: If visual diagram is incomplete, capture and resolve gaps immediately before implementation continues.

tasks.name: Preserve required architecture capabilities
tasks.description: Ensure stateless pipeline, tool caching, test generation, online learning, export options, and deterministic rules remain explicit.

assert: invariants contains do not invent architecture
